languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

languages.text: "Сложный вопрос, а потому интересный! Аугментация с точки зрения Культа Механикус является безусловным благом — плоть слаба и, заменяя ее, мы становимся ближе к Омниссии. Но это благо также является величайшей привилегией. Каждый аугмент — рукотворное чудо, славящее Бога-Машину и не каждый мирянин достоин подобного благословения".

"A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

Но это благо также является величайшей привилегией. Каждый аугмент — рукотворное чудо, славящее Бога-Машину и не каждый мирянин достоин подобного благословения".

Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

"A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

"A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

languages.text: «¡Una cuestión difícil, y, por lo tanto, interesante! Desde la perspectiva del Culto Mechanicus, todo aumento es bien puro: la carne es débil y reemplazarla nos acerca al Omnissiah. Pero este bien es, al mismo tiempo, un privilegio supremo. Todo aumético es un milagro de la artesanía humana que glorifica al Dios Máquina, y no todos los laicos son dignos de tal bendición».
languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

traits.locale_text: «¡Una cuestión difícil, y, por lo tanto, interesante! Desde la perspectiva del Culto Mechanicus, todo aumento es bien puro: la carne es débil y reemplazarla nos acerca al Omnissiah. Pero este bien es, al mismo tiempo, un privilegio supremo. Todo aumético es un milagro de la artesanía humana que glorifica al Dios Máquina, y no todos los laicos son dignos de tal bendición».

languages.text: “这是个棘手的问题，也因此很有意思！机械修会认为植入物是纯粹的善——血肉孱弱，替换它使我们更接近欧姆尼赛亚。但这种善也是一种至高特权。每一件植入物都是人造的奇迹，是对万机之神的赞美，并非每个教外人士都有资格获得这种恩赐。”
languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

traits.locale_text: “这是个棘手的问题，也因此很有意思！机械修会认为植入物是纯粹的善——血肉孱弱，替换它使我们更接近欧姆尼赛亚。但这种善也是一种至高特权。每一件植入物都是人造的奇迹，是对万机之神的赞美，并非每个教外人士都有资格获得这种恩赐。”

languages.text: « C'est un sujet complexe, ce qui le rend d'autant plus intéressant ! Du point de vue du Culte Mechanicus, les augmentations sont pures, et puisque la chair est faible, en la remplaçant, nous nous rapprochons de l'Omnimessie. Cela étant, elles sont aussi un privilège suprême. Chaque augmétique est un miracle créé par l'homme à la gloire du Dieu-Machine, et tous les profanes ne sont pas dignes d'une bénédiction de cette envergure. »
languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

traits.locale_text: « C'est un sujet complexe, ce qui le rend d'autant plus intéressant ! Du point de vue du Culte Mechanicus, les augmentations sont pures, et puisque la chair est faible, en la remplaçant, nous nous rapprochons de l'Omnimessie. Cela étant, elles sont aussi un privilège suprême. Chaque augmétique est un miracle créé par l'homme à la gloire du Dieu-Machine, et tous les profanes ne sont pas dignes d'une bénédiction de cette envergure. »

languages.text: "Eine schwierige und deshalb interessante Frage! Aus der Perspektive des Kult Mechanicus sind Augmentationen ein reines Gut ... Fleisch ist schwach. Ersetzen wir es, kommen wir dem Omnissiah näher. Aber dieses Gut ist auch ein absolutes Privileg. Jede Augmentation ist ein von Menschen gemachtes Wunder, das den Maschinengott glorifiziert, und nicht jeder Laie ist eines solchen Segens würdig."
languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

traits.locale_text: "Eine schwierige und deshalb interessante Frage! Aus der Perspektive des Kult Mechanicus sind Augmentationen ein reines Gut ... Fleisch ist schwach. Ersetzen wir es, kommen wir dem Omnissiah näher. Aber dieses Gut ist auch ein absolutes Privileg. Jede Augmentation ist ein von Menschen gemachtes Wunder, das den Maschinengott glorifiziert, und nicht jeder Laie ist eines solchen Segens würdig."

languages.text: 「難しい質問だ！カルト・メカニクスの観点からすれば、オーグメンテーションは完全無欠の善である-肉体は弱く、それを取り替えることで我々は全能神に近づくことができる。しかし、この善はまた最高の特権でもある。すべてのオーグメティックは機械神を賛美する人為的な奇跡であり、すべての一般人がそのような祝福を受けるに値するわけではない。」
languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

traits.locale_text: 「難しい質問だ！カルト・メカニクスの観点からすれば、オーグメンテーションは完全無欠の善である-肉体は弱く、それを取り替えることで我々は全能神に近づくことができる。しかし、この善はまた最高の特権でもある。すべてのオーグメティックは機械神を賛美する人為的な奇跡であり、すべての一般人がそのような祝福を受けるに値するわけではない。」

languages.text: "Zor bir soru, bu yüzden ilginç bir soru! Cult Mechanicus'a göre ogmentasyon saf bir iyiliktir. Et zayıftır ve onu değiştirmek bizi Hermesih'e yaklaştırır. Ancak bu iyilik, aynı zamanda yüce bir ayrıcalıktır. Her ogmetik, Makine Tanrı'yı yücelten insan yapımı bir mucizedir. Avam, böyle bir lütfa layık değildir."
languages.original_text: "A difficult question, and thus an interesting one! From the perspective of the Cult Mechanicus, augmentation is an unalloyed good — flesh is weak, and replacing it brings us closer to the Omnissiah. But this good is also a supreme privilege. Every augmetic is a man-made miracle that glorifies the Machine God, and not every layperson is worthy of such a blessing."

traits.locale_text: "Zor bir soru, bu yüzden ilginç bir soru! Cult Mechanicus'a göre ogmentasyon saf bir iyiliktir. Et zayıftır ve onu değiştirmek bizi Hermesih'e yaklaştırır.
